title: About
lead: I build readable interfaces and smooth user journeys, while keeping the architecture simple to maintain.

cards.description: I design components as reusable blocks, with a clear visual hierarchy and subtle interactions.
I like connecting the front-end to clean services, so the page delivers concrete value instead of just stacking visual effects.
I focus on UI details to ensure the portfolio stays alive, mobile-friendly, and pleasant to scroll through.
I configure robust and secure server environments, while optimizing SEO to ensure the app performs as well behind the scenes as it does on screen.

highlights: I aim for interfaces that feel controlled within the first few seconds.
Modular architecture, explicit components, and deliberate visual choices.
Responsive rendering, fast to browse, and easy to scale.
